classification.reasoning: The patch introduces new methods and constants related to AWS credential provider remapping, including adding a new configuration property and utility methods to parse key-value pairs from configuration strings. Most changes are straightforward additions and modifications to existing classes, with some fuzzy matching required in S3AUtils.java due to slight structural differences in the target branch. The patch also includes new tests and documentation updates. Overall, the patch is mostly exact matches with some minor fuzzy matching, so it fits TYPE_II complexity.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Adjusted formatting by adding a blank line after a method to improve code readability.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: org.apache.hadoop.conf.Configuration, around a method returning trimmed string collections
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enhance code style and maintain consistent formatting.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of HashMap to support new map-related utility methods.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable usage of HashMap for new methods handling key-value string parsing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced a new static method that parses a string containing comma or newline separated key=value pairs into a Map, trimming whitespace appropriately.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Provide utility to convert configuration-style strings with key=value pairs into a Map for easier programmatic access.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new static method to split a string by '=' delimiter, trimming whitespace, returning an array of strings.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Support parsing of key=value pairs by splitting on '=' with trimming, to be used by higher-level parsing methods.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new constant string key for AWS credentials provider mapping configuration property.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Introduce a configuration key to support mapping of AWS credentials providers via key/value pairs.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of HashMap to support new map-related utility methods.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable usage of HashMap for new methods handling key-value string parsing.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new static method that retrieves a configuration property by name and parses its value as a map of key=value pairs, using the utility method from StringUtils.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Provide a convenient way to extract and parse configuration properties containing key=value pairs into a Map for S3A-related configurations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of the new AWS_CREDENTIALS_PROVIDER_MAPPING constant to support credential provider mapping logic.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Enable usage of the new configuration key for AWS credentials provider mapping in credential provider factory logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added retrieval of AWS credentials provider mappings from configuration as a Map of key-value pairs, to be used alongside existing V1 to V2 credential provider mappings.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: org.apache.hadoop.fs.s3a.auth.CredentialProviderListFactory, within method initializing credential provider mappings
hunk_descriptions.intent: Support additional credential provider mappings configured by users, enabling flexible remapping of credential provider classes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended credential provider remapping logic to check the newly added AWS credentials provider mapping and apply remapping if a mapping exists for a given class name.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Allow dynamic remapping of credential provider class names based on user-defined mappings, enhancing flexibility and compatibility.
